title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.025 - General execution, form
text:
513.025.  General execution, form. — Such execution shall be a fieri facias against the goods, chattels and real estate of the party against whom the judgment, order or decree is rendered, and shall be to the following effect: 
(RSMo 1939 § 1317) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1153; 1919 § 1604; 1909 § 2173 
*Revisor's Note: The words "nineteen hundred" appear in original rolls.  After the year 2000 and in accordance with section 3.060, the reference was changed to "two thousand" by the Revisor.
